character_buff.name: Power of Absinia
character_buff.description: Increases HP for a short time through the special body training method of the Absinia warriors.

skills.name: Sandman
skills.description: Put all enemies in a certain range to sleep.

skills.name: Magical Piercing
skills.description: Reduces Fire/Ice/Lightning/Mental RES to all enemies in a certain area.

skills.name: Ritardi
skills.description: Reduces the Movement Speed of enemies.

levels.value: 80% chance to decrease enemys ATK/MOVE Speed -33% for 8.8 sec.
80% chance to decrease enemys ATK/MOVE Speed -60% for 16 sec.
80% chance to decrease enemys ATK/MOVE Speed -63% for 16.8 sec.
80% chance to decrease enemys ATK/MOVE Speed -66% for 17.6 sec.
80% chance to decrease enemys ATK/MOVE Speed -69% for 18.4 sec.

skills.name: Invisible Stalker
skills.description: Grant invisibility to allies. An invisible character cannot be attacked until he is detected, but cannot use any skill. After using it, [Skill Standby] buff is applied.

skills.name: Fireball
skills.description: Casts a devastating fireball that incinerates all enemies in its path.

skills.name: Burning Hands
skills.description: Increases Fire RES by imbuing Fire attribute to allies attack.

skills.name: Flame Ground
skills.description: Sets [Flame Ground] inflicting constant Fire ATK.

skills.name: Confusion
skills.description: Disables use of skills by confusing the enemy.

skills.name: Enervation
skills.description: Decreases attack speed, Movement Speed and Attack of enemies by 50% for 20 seconds. Natural HP regeneration is halted.

skills.name: Curse
skills.description: Curse enemies in a certain range and deals triple damage.

levels.value: 80% chance to blow 3 times damage to enemy for 6 sec.
80% chance to blow 3 times damage to enemy for 15 sec.
80% chance to blow 3 times damage to enemy for 16 sec.
80% chance to blow 3 times damage to enemy for 17 sec.
80% chance to blow 3 times damage to enemy for 18 sec.

skills.name: Destruction
skills.description: Dead enemies disappear.

skills.name: Stone Disease
skills.description: Immobilizes target but increases defense of the target.

skills.name: Reverse
skills.description: Immobilize enemies by suspending them in the air.

skills.name: Photon Splash
skills.description: Fires a series of Psychokinetic blasts.

skills.name: Amplify
skills.description: Increase magical power.

skills.name: Hole of Darkness
skills.description: Creates a powerful gravity field that pins down all surrounding enemies.
skills.target: Up to 12 enemies within a range of 8m

skills.name: Deep Sleep
skills.description: Enhanced skill of Sandman. Summon other-worldly moth power which has a dark light to make enemies sleep.

skills.name: Improve Disease
skills.description: Enhances its curse, DEF abilities but will be immobilized and attribute RES will be decreased.

skills.name: Blood Curse
skills.description: To increase external damage to enemies in a range, it calls down bloody curse.

skills.name: Gloomy Present
skills.description: The curse of abyss that narrows your view and decrease your Movement Speed.

skills.name: Whole Cancellation
skills.description: Can debuff the enemies in the range and limit enemies to use skill.
skills.target: Up to 6 enemies within a range of 5m

skills.name: Hell Breath
skills.description: To set enemies ablaze, it causes a jet of flame to burst forth from your hands.
skills.target: Up to 6 enemies 6m away and at an angle of 80 degrees

skills.name: Infernal Flames
skills.description: A pillar of Flames of Hell blazes up from the ground, incinerating all enemies within range.
skills.target: Up to 8 enemies within a range of 5m

skills.name: Meteor Strike
skills.description: Brings a blazing meteor down upon the heads of your enemies.

skills.name: Firewall
skills.description: Summons a wall of fire.
skills.target: Up to 8 enemies 8m away and within 4m width

skills.name: Lava Plasma
skills.description: Fire RES and Fire attribute ATK increases much but Ice RES decreases.

skills.name: Blazing Pillar
skills.description: Summons a huge pillar of fire that sets enemies ablaze.

skills.name: Volcanic Eruption
skills.description: Creates a volcanic eruption by accumulating magma beneath the ground.

stances.name: Occult Magic

skills.name: Tenseness
skills.description: Deals damage with strong magnetic wave with attribute of holding weapon.
skills.target: Up to 18 enemies within a range of 6m

skills.name: Ice Vrille
skills.description: Creates a sharp ice pick in a straight line to pierce enemies from the bottom.
skills.target: Up to 12 enemies 15m away and within 5m width

skills.name: Breath of Fire
skills.description: Breathes strong fire to targets.

skills.name: Electric Bluster
skills.description: Creates a lightning ball and makes it explode to deal damage to enemy and nearby targets.

skills.name: Abyss Flare
skills.description: Concentrate the magic power into a single focal point, and deliver a great punch to the enemies.

Ignore additional RES according to extra [INT] * 4

skills.name: Tenseness

skills.target: Up to 18 enemies within a range of 6m

skills.name: Barsel
skills.description: Accumulates mana and inserts it to the body to increase Magical ATK.

skills.name: Flare
skills.description: Increases Monster Damage, by granting mysterious magical power to team members.

stances.name: Elemental Master

skills.name: Elemental Spirit
skills.description: Absorbing elements energy, the body becomes stronger. Canceled in case of Stance change. [Elemental Control] rises to Max 50 and [Elemental Spirit] state appears every 3 levels.

skills.name: Vanishing Flare
skills.description: Throws a magic sphere of flame and electricity. The flame explodes and the electricity flows on the ground.

skills.name: Tornado Flare
skills.description: Ice vortex rages and lightning strikes.

skills.name: Misty Claymore
skills.description: The flame explodes in a wide misty place.

skills.name: Arch Spear
skills.description: Pour the whole power of Flame, Ice and Lightning to the enemy.
